## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] TypeScript passes with `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] ESLint passes with `npm run lint`
- [ ] Production build passes with `npm run build`
- [ ] Smoke tests pass with `npm run test:smoke`
- [ ] E2E tests pass with `npm run test:e2e`
- [ ] SEO, accessibility, sitemap, robots, and JSON-LD behavior are preserved
- [ ] Screenshots are included for visible UI changes
